raw_consumer_statement: I lost my wallet and my phone abroad, filed a local police report and later realized that there were charges that don't belong to me. I flagged these charges totaling up to {$51000.00} at the merchant XXXX XXXX in XXXX on my barclaycard account. Even though I provided the police report and its translation showing I lost my cards and my phone, and reasserting a few different times, the bank still ruled that the charges are valid. When over the phone I asked for a reason, they said the bank placed a call and received an answer to authorize the charges on the day of. However they were placing the call to the same phone that was lost.
